medical_history.history_of_present_illness: History of grade IIIB follicular lymphoma, status post six cycles of R-CHOP, presented with persistent diffuse parotid gland swelling, dry mouth, weight loss, increased splenomegaly. Underwent splenectomy for diagnostic purposes, which showed probable lymphoproliferative disorder. Re-staging CT showed new hilar opacities and enhancing structures within the retroperitoneum. Underwent excisional biopsy, which revealed DLBCL, likely relapsed or transformed from initial grade 3b follicular lymphoma.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Stage 3b follicular lymphoma, depression, vitiligo, diagnosed at age Not specified, mitral valve repair for severe MR Not specified, history of cell carcinoma.
medical_history.family_history: Hodgkin Disease in paternal grandfather. Father underwent coronary artery bypass grafting at age Not specified.

physical_examination.general_examination: VITALS - 98.5 66 18 95% RA. Well appearing woman, NAD. No adenopathy.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological: Alert x 3. Cardiovascular: S1, S2 RRR, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops. Lungs: Clear to auscultation. Abdomen: Soft, non-tender. Gastrointestinal: Deferred. Extremities: No lower extremity edema.
